rag_rules: Use AGREE syntax: assume/guarantee for contracts, eq for equations, const for constants, and assign for assignments
Place input assumptions and output guarantees in component type annexes when concrete bounds or visible relations are available
Write output dependency guarantees relating visible outputs to visible inputs in component type annexes
Use initialized temporal recurrence for stateful equations and nested if-then-else for branching logic
generic_rules: Use AGREE logical operators (and, or, not, =>) for clear contract expressions
Avoid implementation-only subcomponent paths in component type contracts
Use valid AGREE scalar types (int, real, bool) for declarations
Align helper declaration types with expression types to prevent type mismatches
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: Use initialized temporal recurrence for stateful equations
Use nested if-then-else for branching logic
Use AGREE logical operators for clear contract expressions
anti_patterns: Do not encode AADL timing properties as AGREE expressions without explicit ports or constants
Do not use implementation-only subcomponent paths in component type contracts
Do not use invalid AGREE scalar type names (e.g., integer, boolean)
irrelevant_topics: AADL property names are not AGREE variables
AGREE scalar type names must be int, real, or bool
